reviews.review_text: Our villa was changed without confirming with us before arrival.    Not happy.

With delays of traveling my family didn't arrive until midnight. We had no idea what our room number was or where to find the key. An unorganised email. Led us to having to wake up the couple that runs the place to guide us to our villa.

Upon arriving the floors already had traces of grass in it, my mother found grass in her sheets, there was lack of power points for charging devices, the exhaust fan in the bathroom wasn't working and dust was everywhere, leaking to constant sneezing and discomfort in the nose.

Sleeping arrangements were fine but when it came to sleeping on a single mattress on bunk beds I was unable to sleep on my sides from the feeling of springs pressing into my body, yet the bottom bunk was the complete opposite. I then flipped the mattress and found small spots of blood stains on the sheets, I had no cuts on myself, leaving me wondering if the beding had been washed properly.

Wishing the few days of staying it rained and the veranda was bleeding from the staining on wood making shoe prints appearing to have a faint red colour on white tiles. The fan in the master room was so loud that it was almost a yelling match to hear others in the small space.

And trying to sleep in the morning is hard with a busy road being on the other side of the colur bond fence

Personally I would have enjoyed staying anywhere else.
Great location, peaceful place and was happy to help with our late check in.

A few concerns regarding the room quality.
​While I am thankful for the staff’s flexibility with my early check-in, I feel that the $200 price tag for one night did not match the actual conditions of the stay. I’d like to provide some feedback for improvement:
​Odor & Pests: The room had a heavy smell and I experienced several insect bites.
​Equipment: The kitchen stoves (all 4 burners) were out of order.
​Climate Control: The fan only works on the highest setting, and the AC struggles to cool the room.
​Connectivity: The Wi-Fi was unfortunately non-functional.
​The property has potential, but it currently feels very old and poorly maintained for this price point.

Cabins and shared areas are immaculately clean and tidy. Short walk to the Urangan jetty, foreshore parklands, walking tracks and convenience store, with a Woolworths shopping centre a short drive away. Only thing missing is an exhaust fan in the cabin bathroom.
We'd happily stay again.

A nice clean caravan park at a fair price. One of the cheaper parks in Harvey Bay, though we can't get over the charges for a 1 day holiday. A public holiday on Monday and all parks charge for 4 day's.  Is it the parks or do they just like ripping off the public.
Not happy with the price caravan parks want to charge with parking a van or tent on a little piece of ground/ ( dirt in some cases ). Council parks $78 a night, want a blatant rip off. Just sit back and watch the price rise.
Cabin tidy but certainly needed cleaning . No backup service in utilities.
This place is pet friendly. They have pet friendly cabins or sites if in caravan. I hope this review helps someone.

Der Campingplatz liegt an einer Hauptstrasse, unweit vom Meer, von dem langen Pier und vom Strand. Sanitäranlage sehr sauber, Stellfläche ausreichend groß.  Den Abzug gibt es für das nicht kostenfreie Wlan, das ist nicht mehr zeitgemäß.

Loved staying here, the place was well kept, very clean bathrooms, great pool, good location, quiet and nice people around the park. Joseph was a legend and was great to have a chat with. If we are in the area again we will return to this caravan park

Just spent 3 nights here. I've always stayed in caravan park cabins and found them to be really good. This one however, was not so. The shower hadn't been cleaned, only the soap tray because the glass doors were still dirty from whoever had stayed before. Walking around with no shoes on made your feet dirty! What does that suggest? Very old accommodation, not updated at all, ensuite door rotting from the bottom up, mould in the tiles around the floor edges and doors. Queen bed felt like springs were coming through. In other words, my advice is don't book one of these cabins or maybe I was just unlucky. Never staying here again though. Not value for money at all and needing a good clean out. I booked here because it had 4.5/5, but I assume that was caravan parking only.
Glad to find Pet friendly..Couple with furbaby stayed for one night. Was reasonably clean. Furniture and bed were comfy. Staff very friendly. Would stay again
Not bad at all for an unplanned overnight stop.
Great place, great location clean facilities and pet friendly but wifi needs a major upgrade to meet modern expectations for socsl media and streaming

Bring own hair dryer and body wash.
Cosy cabin.

We stayed at the car park for 3 nights. We really enjoyed ilt!
First of all, at the reception we were greeted pleasantly, we were helped with tourist activities in the area and the attitude was pleasant and patient.
The place is maintained in the best possible way, the cleanliness and order are wonderful.
There is everything you need for a good vacation.
Smadar & moshe levy

We come here every year in September and love the convenience. The family love the caravan park (including the magpie my son has named Maxwell). We get left alone to go about our business and if we need anything the service is great. My son left behind his beloved toy and they delivered it to him 3hrs away, you cannot buy that kind of service. We will be forever grateful and return will next year.

Well, what can I say?
If I have any complaints about windmill caravan park it is the fact I had to leave.
By far the best wee bungalo I've ever had the pleasure to inhabit. A quiet, family friendly place that is well maintained and well serviced. A warm irish welcome mixed with warm qld weather, I will certainly be returning to this establishment as soon as I can.
I'm  not being funny, or am a relative to the lovely people that run this joint and trying to big them up; it was an absolute pleasure to be here, and would highly recommend anyone travelling to Hervey bay to stay here. I'll be back as soon as I can.
Great small park. Very clean and friendly. Good location. Walking distance to cafes and beaches as well as market on Wed and Saturday

Haben hier 3 Nächte mit dem Wohnmobil verbracht und von hier aus unsere Ausflüge in die Umgebung gemacht. Sehr kleiner und familiärer Platz. Sehr gepflegt und sauber und alle wirklich sehr nett. Super gelegen und kurzer Weg zum Strand und zum Pier. Uns und unseren beiden kleinen Kindern hat es gut gefallen! Nur das Puzzle im Aufenthaltsraum haben wir nicht mehr fertig geschafft vor der Abreise :-)

Quiet little park (except for the usual hoons & boy racers in the streets). Cosy but once you're in it's fine. Immaculate amenities, lovely pool & easy stroll to the beach, pub, cafe's & parks. Supermarket & specially stores 3 mins drive. Very helpful & friendly staff.
Nice compact caravan park, newly refurbished shower and toilet block not too far from the whale watching tours departure marina.
Loved it so much we stayed an extra week.  Best maintained and cleanest caravan park we’ve stayed in since leaving WA over two months ago. Can’t fault it.

Great warm friendly reception  along with comfy quiet well thoughtout Cabins & Amenities great little Art & Souvenirs store in reception give it try you will love it.
We will be back again.
Thanks Guys.
Craig & Christina.
Alles vorhanden was mit dem Wohnmobil benötigt wird. Hier sind die die saubersten Sanitären Anlagen, welche ich gesehen habe - Top!
Brought my own room, but size of the pitches and facilities were really good and clean.  Would definitely return.

Beautiful place to holiday with family. Not to far from the beach and will definitely be coming back the only down side is the games room is a bit lack luster but the beach is a stone throw aways so no need to worry

Unfortunately not a pleasant stay for me. Booked for 3 nights only stayed for 2. Cabin was not very clean. Clearly had not been swept or vacuumed thoroughly especially behind couch and behind toilet door. Couch and curtains very dusty. The main problem|Though was the infestation of ants coming through window frame. I sprayed several times however they kept returning. The final straw was when I returned from lunch at a local venue to find the bed swarming with ants. I packed up straight away and left after informing the manager. Would not recommend this place.

Hübscher, familiärer Campingplatz. Sauber und gepflegt, speziell auch die Sanitärbereiche. Gut ausgestattet. Der Pool ist auch für kleinere Kinder gut geeignet, da er verschiedene Tiefen hat.

Sehr freundliche Gastgeber. Wir bekamen bei starkem Regen einen Regenschirm, die Besitzerin brachte ihn extra zu unserem Stellplatz.
Great place to stay. Pet friendly, clean and great location. Within walking distance to the beach, restaurants and cafes.  Owners very friendly.

Stayed over in a campervan. Lovely quiet spot but the road can be a little noisy, not difficult to ignore and didn’t spoil anything for us.
Amenities are clean and tidy as are the grounds.
Would definitely recommend
Amazing hosts. The room is clean and tidy, lots of space. Really nice people

We stayed at the powered grass site for 5 nights with our kids. The space was generous and the amenities were clean. Really close to the Urangan pier. Although, the pool size was a bit small. But not a big deal. Would love to go back there again.

Didn't stay in a cabin. Just a car and a swag.
The owners put us in the perfect spot with a power station and perfect for the morning and evening sun with the trees around us for shade at the right time.
Very friendly. Very quiet and chilled guests
Very very clean bathrooms, showers, BBQ areas and pool. Only a couple minutes to the shops and a one street away from the water Will definitely go back there when we go back. Highly recommend.
Very clean and modern amenities, chill vibe. Dropped in after hours cause of a travel hiccup and there were no worries at all. Delightful.

I had a pet friendly cabin, which was absolutely perfect for my 5-day stay in Hervey Bay.  The cabin was very clean abd comfortable. It's just an easy 10 min walk to the Urangan pier where the beach is off lead.   Another off lead beach only 5 min the other way.

Really spacious plots, super friendly host, right by the botanical gardens and the sea front, lots of bird life such as pelicans and ospreys along here at sunset if you're lucky. Amenities modern and clean, as was the camp kitchen.
Good stay, next to the pier but a little far from the center of Hervey Bay. Quiet place, wifi could be better. Although they provided the password, I couldn't connect and I needed to work... 😞

Petit camping, propre et bien situé.
Personnel dévoué.
Amazing place great people and location, the cleanliness should be a credit to the management, just spotless, would definitely stay again and a quiet location also.
Nice place. Centrally located. Good facilities. Clean.
Owner is very nice and accommodating. Shower, toilet and laundry facilities amazing! Very clean and modern. Very much enjoyed our stay

Great location and within walking distance to nearly everything, 2 minute drive and you're at the shops for dinner or coffee.
Great staff, we did a VERY last minute booking and it wasn't an issue and also needed a room that included dogs.
We will be coming back!
Dylan
Great location, close to the water, shops, botanic gardens and the pier. Great, comfortable rooms and Joseph is a fantastic host.
Great location 5 min walk from the Urunga Pier and some waterfront cafes, good amenities and good rooms. Staff were lovely and the games room included a pool table.
Close to the beach. Clean amenities with a big shower area. Park on concrete instead of grass for your site. Nice owners. Friendly.

Perfect location for a stay in Hervey Bay. The Irish gentleman who checked us in was very accommodating with our last minute booking due to inclement weather. The facilities were top class and the amenities were very clean. My only regret is that we couldn’t stay longer!
Very nice caravan park with all facilities. Stayed in our campervan after K’gari tour. Was absolutely perfect. Very nice staff, especially Joseph!

Greeted with rude staff, overgrown everywhere. We wanted to leave from the minute we arrived. School holidays and the park was pretty much empty except for the permanents. Pictures online are nothing like what it really looks like. Plenty of other much nicer places to stay along the waterfront
Had a great two night stay, the owners were lovely and made the whole experience easy and enjoyable. Recommended if you need somewhere to stay in Harvey bay

The cabins are beautiful and clean with everything we needed for our stay. The amenities block is modern and clean with screens to keep the bugs out, the camp kitchen is big enough for many people to use at once with multiple BBQs, sinks, tables, appliances, detergent, tea towels and dish cloths.

Perfect for families, we loved the pool and game room. The owners are friendly and helpful with a sense of humour.

Great location, quiet and secure, under 5 minutes walk to the beach, pier, cafes, restaurants, takeaway, shops and markets.

My e-bike was stolen from this park. There were very few staying at the park at the time. Everything needs to be locked away out of sight. The wire rope securing my bike to my motorhome was cut at 3:30 am, we searched through the footage on their security cameras.
Just be aware. Hervey Bay is notorious for thieves targeting caravan parks. So disappointing.

Fantastic caravan park! Probably the cleanest one we have stayed at on our 9 day travel from Cairns! Lovely pool and super quiet! It was in a Lovely location and the owners were a delight! Thank you so much

We recently stayed with family & friends on powered sites. The caravan park is very well looked after. Close to shops and attractions.
We just wish the pool stayed open longer as it was still quite hot at night.
We look forward to returning one day soon.

We had our new motorhome maliciously damaged here and the staff have not replied or taken any interest. Avoid this park to save damage to your vehicles.
The park owners have been updating cabins with new appliances and aircons. Dog friendly too

Abbiamo passato in questo campeggio una sola notte le piazzole sono pulite come pure i servizi la proprietaria alla reception è stata molto gentile e disponibile nell’ aiutarci a trovare un tour per K’Gari nonostante fossimo arrivati molto tardi
Great location reasonably priced
Very friendly and flexible staff helping some Norwegian first-time campers settling in nicely! Thanks for our stay!
Nice campsite! The toilets were very clean, we will visit again!
Receptionist was great and it was an easy walk to beach or out for tea at bayswater, amenities were great with the bench in shower being able to be folded up for someone in a wheel chair
A great little caravan park that is very central to town. We would stay there again. Lovely customer service.
Brilliant stay in this campsite. Clean and hot showers and couldn’t fault it at all. Got a good powered site and accommodated late check in for us. Would highly recommend.
Great clean little CP. Staff great. Best showers I've seen in a while. New, well designed & nice strong pressure. Lovely pool. Great kitchen.

Didn't stay here. Visited family. Cute little cabin
5 min walk to beach & pub in opposite direction..10 min walk. Went for dinner there, it was nice
Great service
A friendly , safe and quiet park with very clean amenities. Close to beach , pier and shops. Highly recommend 👌

Stayed here with our van for three nights visiting family. Windmill's location is great, it's a short walk to the restaurants & cafes and Urangan pier. There's a nice pool, rustic camp kitchen, and modern & clean amenities. The sites are ok, but the access roads are rather tight, still- that doesn't detract from the overall experience.

I originally booked 3 nights in this park, but my husband had been very ill since the day before we arrived in Hervey Bay and on going to a doctor there he was sent to hospital.  I therefore arrived at the park in our motorhome without him, and the owner Joseph very kindly backed the motorhome into our site for me.  I had to extend our stay as we were unsure how long my husband would be in hospital, so Joseph blanked out the site for over another 8 days should I need it, which was a huge stress relief.  Fortunately we didn't need that long but did spend a week in this small but nice park. Very clean, new amenities, a short walk to the Esplanade and beach, and a shopping centre at the end of the street.  Dog friendly and our dog enjoyed the grass site. Would definitely stay again and thanks again to Joseph for all your help.
Great little park

We went there with our Motor home and I was impressed how nice and clean everything was. We will definitely go back on our way home. Everyone is so nice and friendly, we had the best experience ever.
Best of all, we even could come with our sweet fur baby.
Great spacious camp kitchen, clean amenties and friendly helpful staff. One of the tidest, cleanest places we have stayed. Good weekly rates.
Walking distance to water and restaurants. Small, yet comfortable stand for large caravan. Clean amenities. Pool on site.

Reception are friendly and very helpful. Directions and guidance to our site was informative and helpful. Our site however, was not an easy site to navigate onto. We had already been ask not to run over the light pole or hit the new back fence. That was a good start to “ how are we going to achieve this without knocking over the light pole or hitting the back fence.” Hubby is great a directions and with much arm throwing and a few of those words, we managed to get our 20.6 plus draw bar onto the sight. But then it can to leaving time. This was a totally different story. Let me tell you why…the day before leaving we went out of dinner. Parked the vehicle and then went to walk to the footpath only to trip and have foot “stuck” in a stupid black bike rake about a foot high. You could not see it in the dark…but bloody hell, it made a mess of one’s foot. Ok..now you have the picture….so we decided to leave a day early. Person across from site 6 was home…but fast asleep…so did not want to wake to ask if could move vehicle. Person to our right was having car trouble….picture gets better. So we back up at a near 90 degree Angel to hitch up. Got that done….then it’s a “hard up” to the left to exit site, but we did it. Got out of the park and drove a few Kms up the road, only to have a noise coming from at first we thought the van….but no it was not….we just did our CV joint in the vehicle. So, a mad phone call back the the caravan park to see if we could come back in for a few nights….and yes they accommodated us again..but this time on a site that was so much easier to get onto. The receptionist was more then helpful …. She not only got us onto a site that we could navigate easily (because the CV joint was RS) but she also referred us to a brilliant mechanic, at Hervey Bay Automotive. We where so grateful to the receptionist at the Windmill Caravan Park for everything she did for us. This was excellent service and so appreciated.|In general, the park is a small park, some tight sites, but the shower/toilet block, camp kitchen, laundry block, and dog wash where all clean and quite new. The showers had room to party in! Also has a swimming pool as well. Would we return to this park…..YES! And it is pet friendly.

Cleanest facilities we've been so far in our roadtrip along Queensland. A large kitchen that has everything you need and a nice sofa area with board games. But above all we loved Tom, nicest host ever, very friendly and accesible. Will definitely recommend!!

The most clean camping that I ever been to.
Tom is a great host, very friendly and funny. He loves his scooter 🤙🏻
The pool and the game room are great.
Thanks Tom for welcoming us is a such a lovely way. The facilities are really cleaned and spacious. I would come back with no doubts.

Really clean toilets, Tom is a really chill guy (and that is what i look in people managing a camping site), good living room to play pool, nice kitchen. Probably the best place to stay in a not really interesting city.
Camp spot was fantastic 👏 camp kitchen and bathroom facilities clean, tidy and well lit.
